summary: Tested Universal URL Tracking feature for i'M On Social RMS app. All 20 backend tests pass. All endpoints working correctly: POST /api/s/wrap, POST /api/s/wrap-bulk, POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_id}/rewrap-links, PUT /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_id} (auto-wrap), POST /api/training/admin/tracks/{track_id}/lessons (auto-wrap), PUT /api/training/lessons/{lesson_id} (auto-wrap), GET /api/s/{short_code} (redirect with click tracking).
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/s/wrap (short_urls.py line ~1053): Correctly validates required fields (url, user_id), auto-detects YouTube URLs as training_video type, idempotent (returns existing short_code for same URL)
POST /api/s/wrap-bulk (short_urls.py line ~1107): Correctly handles array of URLs, validates required fields, returns wrapped_count and results array
POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_id}/rewrap-links (campaigns.py line ~1259): Scans sequences for raw URLs and wraps them with tracking, patches pending sends
PUT /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_id} (campaigns.py line ~740): Auto-wraps URLs in sequences.media_urls and sequences.message_template when saving
POST /api/training/admin/tracks/{track_id}/lessons (training.py line ~656): Auto-wraps video_url when creating a lesson, stores original_video_url for reference
PUT /api/training/lessons/{lesson_id} (training.py line ~533): Auto-wraps video_url when updating a lesson
GET /api/s/{short_code} (short_urls.py line ~728): Returns HTML with JS redirect, increments click_count, logs click to short_url_clicks collection, fires contact_event for analytics
seed_data_creation: Created test short URLs, campaigns, and training lessons during testing (all cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal URL Tracking feature fully tested and working. Key endpoints: /api/s/wrap (single URL), /api/s/wrap-bulk (multiple URLs), /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_id}/rewrap-links (rewrap existing campaign), auto-wrap on campaign update and training lesson create/update. YouTube URLs auto-detected as training_video type. Idempotent: same URL returns same short_code. Click tracking works via GET /api/s/{short_code}.
